name: Phantom Lancer
description: We outnumbered you. We outnumber them all! Azwraith, the Phantom Lancer.

abilities.name: Illusory Armaments
abilities.description: Azwraith's illusion has a min illusion damage dealt factor corresponding to the hero's attack damage value upon creation, for a duration. Min Illusion Damage Dealt: 17%. Ability Level Up Interval: 3. Min Illusion Damage Dealt Bonus: 2%. Duration: 3 (5).

abilities.name: Spirit Lance
abilities.description: Sends a magical spirit lance to a target enemy unit that damages and slows its movement speed. Cast Range: 600/650/700/750. Damage: 100/160/220/280 (200/260/320/380). Move Speed Slow: 14%/21%/28%/35%. Slow Duration: 3.75 (4.75). Number of Illusions: 1. Damage Dealt: 20% (70%). Cooldown: 10/9/8/7. Mana Cost: 120.

abilities.name: Doppelganger
abilities.description: Nummer Eins deals no damage and does not receive additional incoming damage. This illusion's duration is not extended. Nummer Zwei deals a portion of Phantom Lancer's damage and receive additional incoming damage. This illusion's duration is not extended. Cast Range: 575 (700). Illusion Gather Radius: 900. Reappear Radius: 325. Reappear Time: 1. Gathered Illusion Bonus Duration: 2. Number of Illusion One: 1. Cooldown: 22/18/14/10. Mana Cost: 70.

abilities.name: Phantom Rush
abilities.description: Grants Azwraith and his illusions both haste and phase movement upon proc. Creates Juxtapose-based illusions that automatically attacks the enemy units Azwraith rushes through. Additionally creates an illusions after a certain distance is rushed. Min Proc Distance: 200. Max Proc Distance: 600/675/750/825 (1225/1300/1375/1450). Haste Speed: 800. Max Haste Duration: 5. Collision Radius: 125. Distance Counter: 600. Cooldown: 13/10/7/4.

abilities.name: Juxtapose
abilities.description: Has a chance to create an illusion of himself per attack. Proc Chance: 40%/45%/50%. Duration from Hero: 8. Illusion Proc Chance: 9% (12%). Duration from Illusions: 4. Damage Dealt: 15%. Damage Taken: 600% (530%).
